description.value: > Natural Flyer All your life, the sky has beckoned to you, and you have dreamed of reveling in the freedom and bliss of flight. You gain a +1 trait bonus on Fly checks, as well as Acrobatics checks attempted while flying. Fly is always a class skill for you.
